description_long: This object consists of two adjacent slot machine-style arcade game cabinets, each with a prominent front display featuring colorful graphics and a variety of game symbols. The cabinets are constructed from metallic material with a reflective, brushed finish, and each has a large, curved glass or plastic screen area above a control panel. The control panels are equipped with multiple buttons and a classic lever on the right side, typical of slot machines. At the top of each cabinet is a cylindrical light or indicator, and the upper front section displays vibrant marquee artwork with game titles and thematic imagery. The sides and back of the cabinets are plain, metallic, and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design.
description: A pair of metallic slot machine arcade cabinets with colorful front displays, control panels, and classic levers, topped with vibrant marquee artwork and indicator lights.
description_view_0: Front view showing both cabinets' colorful game displays, control panels with buttons and levers, and prominent marquee artwork.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metallic, reflective surface, the protruding control panel, and the lever on the right side.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the flat, metallic tops of the cabinets and the cylindrical indicator lights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain metallic side and the depth of the control panel area.
attribute_screen_type: unknown (screen is present but the display technology is not visually identifiable; appears flat with a bezel)
attribute_control_panel_layout: Each cabinet features a single-player control panel with multiple rectangular buttons and a large mechanical lever on the right side; the layout is typical for slot machines.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Both cabinets have vibrant marquee artwork at the top, with bold text (e.g., 'VegasStar') and thematic imagery such as palm leaves and bright colors, reflecting a casino or tropical theme.
